subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and devoted servant of the Abhá Beauty! Thy services on the day of the ascension of His Holiness the Afnán at the Threshold of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده ثابت نابت جمال ابهی خدماتت در یوم عروج حضرت افنان در آستان حضرت رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action
